summary: Phase 46 Testing Complete - Email Audit Log, Unified Account, Enterprise RFQ Portal. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for all 3 features.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test RFQs via /api/rfq/submit with brand token during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 46 features fully tested. Key findings: (1) Email Audit Log: GET /api/email/admin/logs works with filters (order_id, brand_id, kind). Admin order detail modal shows 'Email Audit Trail' section with log entries or empty state for older orders. (2) Unified Account: PUT /api/brand/profile works for brand_admin role with GST validation (15 chars). GET /api/brand/ledger returns enriched entries with order.products array. BrandAccount.js has 5 tabs (Overview, Profile, Addresses, Orders, Activity Ledger) all working. (3) Enterprise RFQ Portal: POST /api/rfq/submit with brand token stamps brand_id and brand_user_id. GET /api/brand/queries?status=received|not_received|closed works with quotes_count and best_quote. BrandQueries.js shows 3 tabs with query cards. BrandQueryDetail.js shows full RFQ with quotes array and is_best_price flag.

backend.GET /api/email/admin/logs/{log_id}: PASS - Returns single log with HTML body

frontend.OrderEmailAudit component: PASS - Renders in admin order detail modal
frontend.Empty state: PASS - Shows message for orders without logs

backend.GET /api/brand/ledger: PASS - Returns enriched entries with order.products

frontend.BrandAccount tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs render (Overview, Profile, Addresses, Orders, Activity Ledger)
frontend.Profile edit form: PASS - Shows name, GST, phone, address fields
frontend.Ledger enrichment: PASS - Shows product links in ledger entries

backend.GET /api/brand/queries/{rfq_id}: PASS - Returns full RFQ with quotes array

frontend.Query cards: PASS - Display RFQ details with quotes_count and best_quote
